query:
-- Clear Ryan's and Kevin's stuck pending rows
UPDATE userEmailSendLog
SET status = 'failed',
    error = 'STALE: pending slot never finalised — cleared by admin 2026-05-15'
WHERE digestType = 'thursday'
  AND sentDate = '2026-05-14'
  AND status = 'pending';

SELECT id, userId, status, error FROM userEmailSendLog
WHERE digestType = 'thursday' AND sentDate = '2026-05-14';
